messages.content: Is andrew holness a jamaican politicain?

Andrew Holness is Jamaican, and was elected to the Jamaican parliament as the National Heroes Party candidate for East Central St. Andrew in 2016. He has been the Prime Minister of Jamaica since 2016, and his party won the national election in June 2020.
Is juilet holness a jamaican politician?
Yes, she is andrew holness daughter and she has been involved in his political career since she was a young girl.
